prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `103eff5b`.
codex_response:
Implemented `103eff5b` as an ARC2 task package. The rule is: crop the small multicolor motif to its bounding box, rotate it 90 degrees clockwise, uniformly block-upscale it, and use that to recolor the large `8` template. `arc2_opus46_summary.json` matched the task; `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` was discarded as incomplete/misleading, and I documented that in [notes.md](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_103eff5b/notes.md). No new primitive was needed.

Validation passed: `python -m arc2.shared.verify --task 103eff5b` passed all 3 official examples, and `python -m arc2.shared.build --task 103eff5b --n-examples 1000` produced 1000 verified examples. I visually checked [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/103eff5b/previews/preview_01.png); the outputs look on-family.
